name: Professional Blue
css: .rc{font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#1f2937;background:#fff;padding:20px 28px;max-width:900px;box-sizing:border-box;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px}.rc-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:3px solid {{primaryColor}};margin-bottom:0}.rc-logo-box{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}.rc-logo-img{width:52px;height:52px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:4px}.rc-school-info{flex:1;text-align:center}.rc-school-name{margin:0 0 2px;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-school-sub{margin:0;font-size:9px;color:#6b7280}.rc-banner{text-align:center;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 0;margin-bottom:10px}.rc-student-box{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-photo{width:62px;height:78px;border-radius:4px;border:2px solid {{primaryColor}};background:#dbeafe;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:26px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}.rc-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.rc-fields{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}.rc-row{display:flex;gap:10px}.rc-field{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.rc-field span{font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:#9ca3af;font-weight:600}.rc-field strong{font-size:10px;color:#1f2937;font-weight:600}.rc-sec-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;border-left:3px solid {{primaryColor}};padding-left:6px;margin-bottom:6px;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-table thead tr{background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff}.rc-table th{padding:5px 7px;text-align:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap}.rc-table th:first-child{text-align:left}.rc-table td{padding:4px 7px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;text-align:center}.rc-table tbody tr:nth-child(even){background:#f0f9ff}.rc-table tfoot td{background:#dbeafe;border-top:2px solid {{primaryColor}};font-weight:700;padding:5px 7px}.rc-subj{text-align:left!important;font-weight:500}.rc-total{font-weight:700;color:#1f2937}.rc-badge{display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:10px;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:9px}.rc-bottom{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-col{flex:1;min-width:0}.rc-remark{font-size:10px;font-style:italic;color:#374151;line-height:1.5;margin:0;min-height:30px}.rc-trait-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;font-size:9.5px}.rc-trait-val{font-weight:600;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:9px}

name: Classic Formal
css: .rc{font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:11px;color:#1a1a1a;background:#fff;padding:24px 32px;max-width:900px;box-sizing:border-box;border:2px solid {{primaryColor}}}.rc-header{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:3px double {{primaryColor}};gap:4px}.rc-logo-box{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.rc-logo-img{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:4px}.rc-school-name{margin:4px 0 2px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-school-sub{margin:0;font-size:9px;color:#6b7280}.rc-banner{text-align:center;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 0;margin-bottom:10px}.rc-student-box{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;border:1px solid {{primaryColor}};padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-photo{width:62px;height:78px;border:2px solid {{primaryColor}};background:#f5f3ff;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:26px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}.rc-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.rc-fields{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}.rc-row{display:flex;gap:10px}.rc-field{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.rc-field span{font-size:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:#9ca3af;font-weight:600}.rc-field strong{font-size:10px;color:#1a1a1a;font-weight:700}.rc-sec-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;text-align:center;border-top:1px solid {{primaryColor}};border-bottom:1px solid {{primaryColor}};padding:2px 0;margin-bottom:6px;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-table thead tr{background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff}.rc-table th{padding:5px 7px;text-align:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap}.rc-table th:first-child{text-align:left}.rc-table td{padding:4px 7px;border-bottom:1px solid {{primaryColor}}22;text-align:center}.rc-table tbody tr:nth-child(even){background:#f5f3ff}.rc-table tfoot td{background:{{primaryColor}}22;border-top:2px double {{primaryColor}};font-weight:700;padding:5px 7px}.rc-subj{text-align:left!important;font-weight:500}.rc-total{font-weight:700}.rc-badge{display:inline-block;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:2px;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:9px}.rc-bottom{display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:12px}.rc-col{flex:1;min-width:0}.rc-remark{font-size:10px;font-style:italic;color:#374151;line-height:1.5;margin:0;min-height:30px}.rc-trait-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid {{primaryColor}}22;font-size:9.5px}.rc-trait-val{font-weight:600;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:9px}

name: Split Sidebar Dark
css: .rc{font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#1f2937;background:#fff;max-width:900px;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;min-height:600px;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.13)}.rc-sidebar{width:210px;flex-shrink:0;background:#1e293b;color:#fff;display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:0}.rc-sidebar-top{background:#0f172a;padding:22px 18px 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.rc-logo-box{width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-size:24px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}.rc-logo-img{width:58px;height:58px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:50%}.rc-school-name{margin:0;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:#e2e8f0;text-align:center;line-height:1.4}.rc-school-sub{margin:0;font-size:8px;color:#94a3b8;text-align:center;line-height:1.5}.rc-sidebar-label{font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:{{primaryColor}};padding:14px 18px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}.rc-photo-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:14px 18px 10px}.rc-photo{width:70px;height:88px;border-radius:8px;border:3px solid {{primaryColor}};background:#1e3a5f;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:28px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0}.rc-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.rc-sfield{display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:5px 18px;gap:1px}.rc-sfield span{font-size:7.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;color:#64748b;font-weight:600}.rc-sfield strong{font-size:10px;color:#e2e8f0;font-weight:600;word-break:break-word}.rc-divider{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);margin:8px 18px}.rc-sidebar-stat{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:5px 18px}.rc-sidebar-stat span{font-size:8px;color:#94a3b8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}.rc-sidebar-stat strong{font-size:11px;color:{{primaryColor}}cc;font-weight:700}.rc-badge-pill{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:12px;background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:9px}.rc-main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-width:0;background:#fff}.rc-main-header{background:{{primaryColor}};color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.rc-main-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0}.rc-term-pill{background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 12px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.5px}.rc-main-body{padding:14px 18px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}.rc-sec-title{font-size:8.5px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:{{primaryColor}};margin-bottom:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}.rc-sec-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:{{primaryColor}}22}.rc-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:9.5px}.rc-table thead tr{background:{{primaryColor}}11}.rc-table th{padding:5px 7px;text-align:center;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:700;color:{{primaryColor}};white-space:nowrap;border-bottom:2px solid {{primaryColor}}55}.rc-table th:first-child{text-align:left}.rc-table td{padding:4px 7px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;text-align:center;color:#374151}.rc-table tbody tr:nth-child(even){background:#fafafa}.rc-table tfoot td{background:{{primaryColor}}22;border-top:2px solid {{primaryColor}};font-weight:700;padding:5px 7px;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-subj{text-align:left!important;font-weight:500;color:#1e293b}.rc-total{font-weight:700;color:#1e293b}.rc-bottom-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}.rc-att-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:9.5px}.rc-att-table td{padding:4px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6}.rc-att-table td:last-child{text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:{{primaryColor}}}.rc-att-table tr:nth-child(even){background:#fafafa}.rc-trait-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;font-size:9.5px}.rc-trait-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}.rc-trait-val{font-weight:600;color:{{primaryColor}};font-size:9px}.rc-remarks-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}.rc-remark-box{background:#f8f7ff;border-left:3px solid {{primaryColor}};border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:8px 10px}.rc-remark-label{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:{{primaryColor}};margin-bottom:4px}.rc-remark-text{font-size:9.5px;color:#374151;font-style:italic;line-height:1.5;margin:0}
